description.heading: Job Description
description.body: We are looking for a highly motivated {role} to join our core team. You will be responsible for helping us build innovative solutions and scaling our technology platforms to reach more students.

applyForm.heading: Apply for this Position
applyForm.subheading: Your profile information will be shared with the recruiter automatically.
applyForm.whyHirePlaceholder: Briefly describe your experience and interest...

successCard.heading: Application Sent!
successCard.message: The recruiter has been notified. You can track your application status in your dashboard.

alerts.alreadyApplied: You have already applied for this position.
alerts.permissionDenied: Application denied by database permissions. Please make sure you are signed in and try again.
alerts.submitFailed: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
